text.message: Congrats on the port orange, respect the play

Blue didn’t have a city at that point
Without port it's hard to progress as much
Lolol dude has 3 devs and you’re not blocking him
Blue ur abt to plow me aren’t u lmao
I legit can’t believe you left a dude with city and 3 down devs unblocked
It’ll be you the rest of the way for that solo fyi
Ahhh just saw black has 22% win percent. Makes much more sense
Gg blue. Black, really good solo man
You should try checkers. This game is too complex for you
AST chance before I port OJ

Let him get army by not using a knight last turn. Just really really bad
Gotta be carefull with Orange though
Have knight two VPs so just whip it around asap I guess
